hero.subtitle: Rwanda's most admired supermarket — a testament to the country's economic resurgence, proudly meeting the daily needs of Kigali and beyond since 2008.

origin.heading: Where It All Began
origin.paragraph1: SIMBA SUPERMARKET LTD was established on December 3, 2007, as a Limited Liability Company with a clear ambition: to become the region's largest retail outlet. Founded by Mr. Teklay Teame and his partners, the company imports products from Europe, Egypt, Dubai, China, Turkey, and beyond to ensure a truly diverse product range.
origin.paragraph2: The official launch on August 8, 2008 created over 450 jobs for Rwandese citizens. With 11 branches across Rwanda, Simba provides a one-stop shopping experience — butchery, bakery, coffee shop, and more — serving international organisations, local NGOs, private companies, and government ministries.

respect.title: Respect for the Individual
respect.body: We're hardworking, ordinary people who've teamed up to accomplish extraordinary things. We treat each other with dignity and encourage everyone to express their thoughts — this is how we show respect.

service.title: Service to Customers
service.body: Our customers are the reason we're in business. We offer quality merchandise at the lowest prices with the best customer service possible, always seeking to exceed expectations.

excellence.title: Striving for Excellence
excellence.body: We're proud of our accomplishments but never satisfied. We constantly reach further to bring new ideas and goals to life — Is this the best I can do? That question drives everything.

2007.label: Founded
2007.desc: Established as a Limited Liability Company on December 3rd by Mr. Teklay Teame and partners.

2008.label: 1st Branch
2008.desc: Official launch on August 8th — Simba Centenary opens, creating over 450 jobs for Rwandese citizens.

2014.label: Expanding
2014.desc: Simba Gishushu branch opens. Awarded Best Exhibitor Retail & Distribution — EBM Best Award.

2015.label: Growing
2015.desc: Simba Kimironko branch opens. Awarded RRA Compliant Taxpayer status.

2016.label: Scaling Up
2016.desc: Two new branches open — Simba Kicukiro and Simba Kigali Height.

2019.label: City Centre
2019.desc: Simba UTC opens in the heart of Kigali.

2020.label: Merchant of Year
2020.desc: Awarded 1st Merchant of the Year in Rwanda.

2023.label: Major Expansion
2023.desc: Five new branches launch simultaneously — Simba Gacuriro, Simba Gikondo, Simba Sonatube, Simba Kisimenti, and Simba Rebero.

2024.label: Going Digital
2024.desc: Simba Online Sales launches — bringing the supermarket experience directly to customers' doors.

supermarket.title: Supermarket
supermarket.desc: 11 branches across Rwanda offering a wide range of products for daily needs.

online.desc: Extending our reach to your door — Simba Supermarket is everywhere.

bakery.title: Bakery Factory

coffee.heading: Coffee Shops
coffee.desc: Simba Coffee Shops and one Trucillo Café across five branches, offering a relaxing experience for every shopper.
